objective: Amend the Secret Provisioning UX Stage 6 closeout after downstream residual follow-ups merged and closed.
scope_boundary: Update the existing #507 closeout residual-risk section with downstream completion evidence.
Add issue #532 plan, execution-scope, and validation artifacts.
out_of_scope: Changing Secret Provisioning UX standards, validators, deploy gates, or bootstrap behavior.
Credential handling, secret rotation, generated env files, signed URLs, Authorization headers, raw phone numbers, or screenshots.
Graph/wiki refresh beyond hook-generated closeout write-back.
research_summary: PR #531 converted #507 to a full Stage 6 closeout while the downstream rollout issues were still residual follow-ups. HealthcarePlatform #1470, ai-integration-services #1215, seek-and-ponder #167, and Stampede #120 are now closed by merged PRs with required checks green. The closeout residual-risk section should be amended to record completion rather than leave stale residual status.

sprints.name: Downstream residual closeout
sprints.goal: Make the #507 closeout match the final downstream rollout state.
tasks: Verify downstream issue, PR, merge commit, merged timestamp, closure, and check status evidence.
Update the #507 closeout residual-risk and issue-link sections.
Update docs/PROGRESS.md and add issue #532 validation artifacts.
Run the existing closeout hook and preserve only hook-generated closeout graph/wiki outputs.
Run governance validation, publish PR, and merge when checks are green.
acceptance_criteria: The closeout artifact no longer lists the four downstream follow-ups as open residuals.
The closeout artifact records downstream PR links, merge commits, merge timestamps, and issue closure state.
Validation evidence records the GitHub state checks and local governance checks.
No downstream repo files are modified.

specialist_reviews.focus: Independently verify downstream rollout completion and identify stale governance closeout text.
specialist_reviews.summary: Read-only verification confirmed all four downstream issues are closed and their PRs are merged. It identified the #507 closeout residual-risk block as stale and recommended updating the closeout artifact plus optional progress mirror evidence.

alternate_model_review.summary: This is a post-rollout evidence amendment; it does not change architecture, standards, validators, or implementation behavior.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Write only issue #532 governance closeout amendment evidence, progress mirror updates, and hook-generated graph/wiki closeout outputs.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Run validation, publish the PR, wait for required checks, and merge.

material_deviation_rules: If any downstream issue or PR is not actually closed or merged, leave it as residual and record the blocker.
If downstream repository edits appear necessary, stop and open a downstream issue instead of editing those repos.
If validation finds a policy defect beyond closeout evidence, create or update a separate governance issue.
